creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text: Thanks a lot.  I'll be looking forwards to your patch!  You can just attach it to this bug report.  Make sure to set maintainer-approval to "?" with the current maintainer's address.  It does not appear that the maintainer still cares about the port, but policy is to give the maintainer two weeks to respond before third party patches can be committed without maintainer approval.
